data.title: Gabrielle Harvey and Brendan Callahan are new Executive Vice Chairs at Cushman & Wakefield in Boston.
data.description: In Boston, Cushman & Wakefield has welcomed Gabrielle Harvey and Brendan Callahan as Executive Vice Chairs in the firm's Boston office. Their appointments aim to bolster the team's leadership and strategic efforts.

data.title: Bart M. Schwartz testifies before House subcommittee on NYCHA, presenting findings from five-year tenure as federal monitor.
data.description: In New York, Bart M. Schwartz, the chairman and co-founder of Guidepost Solutions, recently testified before the House Financial Services Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee on February 10, 2026. He shared insights and suggestions based on his five-year role as the initial federal monitor for the New York City Housing Authority (NYCHA). The NYCHA has been under scrutiny, and Schwartz's testimony highlighted significant findings and recommendations. Guidepost Solutions is known for its expertise in investigations, compliance, monitoring, and security consulting on a global scale.

data.title: Terry Esterline explains how to choose long-term care facility in HelloNation; addresses steps for evaluation.
data.description: In Hillsdale, Michigan on February 12, 2026, a recently released linked HelloNation article offers guidance to families on ensuring confidence in selecting long-term care for their loved ones. This article provides practical steps for families to follow when assessing long-term care choices.

data.title: Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Ltd closed the sale of 375,000 extra shares in IPO, raising total gross proceeds to $11.5 million.
data.description: Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited, a company focusing on Phase Change Material storage systems for cooling and heating applications through its Hong Kong subsidiary, Boca International Limited, has successfully closed the sale of an additional 375,000 ordinary shares at $4.00 per share. This was part of their initial public offering, resulting in total gross proceeds of $11,500,000, which includes the previously announced $10,000,000 from the IPO. After deducting underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated offering expenses, the Company has raised significant funds.

NETANYAHU BEFORE LEAVING WASHINGTON: THE PRESIDENT BELIEVES THAT THE IRANIANS NOW UNDERSTAND WHO THEY ARE DEALING WITH. I THINK THE CONDITIONS HE IS SETTING, COMBINED WITH THEIR UNDERSTANDING THAT THEY MADE A MISTAKE LAST TIME BY NOT REACHING AN AGREEMENT, COULD LEAD THEM TO

NETANYAHU BEFORE LEAVING WASHINGTON: HOWEVER, I MADE IT CLEAR THAT IF AN AGREEMENT IS REACHED, IT MUST INCLUDE THE COMPONENTS THAT ARE IMPORTANT TO US, TO THE STATE OF ISRAEL, AND IN MY VIEW TO THE ENTIRE INTERNATIONAL COMMUNITY: NOT ONLY THE NUCLEAR ISSUE, BUT ALSO BALLISTIC

NETANYAHU BEFORE LEAVING WASHINGTON: IT WAS AN EXCELLENT CONVERSATION. OF COURSE, WE ALSO TOUCHED ON GAZA, THE BROADER REGION, AND OTHER GENERAL MATTERS. IN ANY CASE, THIS WAS ANOTHER DISCUSSION WITH A GREAT FRIEND OF THE STATE OF ISRAEL — A PRESIDENT LIKE NO OTHER"

data.title: Bluecore partners with dentsu, increasing ID rates by 20-50% for retailers. Prioritizes privacy. (Word count: 13, characters: 84)
data.description: Bluecore, a company specializing in retail shopper identification and customer movement technology, revealed that its integration with dentsu has resulted in a significant 20-50% increase in identification rates. This development is crucial for enterprise retailers as it allows them to identify a larger pool of shoppers while prioritizing a privacy-first approach. The announcement was made in New York on February 12, 2026.

data.title: Launch of National IQ in No. Virginia aims to accelerate technologies at intersection of national competitiveness; in Arlington and Alexandria; in National Landing.
data.description: A new project called the National Innovation Quarter (National IQ) has been launched in Arlington and Alexandria, Virginia. This innovation district aims to unite leaders across academia, entrepreneurship, government, and private industry to address critical challenges in national competitiveness and cutting-edge technology. Spanning across National Landing, which includes Crystal City and Penta, the district is highly connected and designed to foster collaboration.

data.title: Zilliz Cloud opens new AWS region in Ireland (eu-west-1) to expand global infrastructure, behind open-source vector database.
data.description: A tech company based in Redwood City, California, Zilliz, has revealed the launch of a new Zilliz Cloud region in AWS eu-west-1 (Ireland) on Feb. 12, 2026. This move aims to enhance its global infrastructure for the popular open-source vector database, Milvus. This expansion showcases the company's commitment to broader reach and efficiency in catering to a wider user base. The introduction of this new region signifies a significant milestone for Zilliz, indicating promising growth and a proactive approach to meeting the demands of its users.
